title: SSE Pipeline Event Message
description: Schema for the PipelineEventPayload sent as SSE data via GET /pipelines/:trackId/events on the Backstage service. Each event carries a unique id for Last-Event-ID replay support.

id.description: Unique event identifier. Used as the SSE 'id' field for Last-Event-ID replay. Must be stable across reconnections.

type.description: SSE event type. Always 'pipeline.event' for pipeline events.

event.description: NATS subject name of the original domain event (e.g., 'track.uploaded', 'track.petrified.generated').

trackId.description: Track identifier this pipeline event belongs to. Used for per-track stream scoping.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was recorded by Backstage.

payload.description: Original event payload from the domain event. Structure varies by event type.
